bug.description: protocol timer not started or stopped at the required point in the procedure

prompt:
There is a protocol timer not started or stopped at the required point in the procedure downstream of function oai_fapi_tx_data_req in the nfapi/oai_integration/aerial subsystem.
The function is located at nfapi/oai_integration/aerial/fapi_nvIPC.c:439.
Please investigate and fix this issue.
